methods.method_name: Plant Material Sampling and Molecular Techniques
methods.description: This method involves collecting leaf samples from stone oak populations and performing molecular techniques to extract and sequence DNA for genetic analysis.

steps.description: Leaf samples were collected from stone oak populations covering various geographic areas.
steps.searchable_summary: collect leaf samples from specified geographic locations

steps.description: Total genomic DNA was extracted from leaf samples using a modified cetyl trimethylammonium bromide (CTAB) method.
steps.searchable_summary: extract genomic DNA using CTAB method

steps.description: The DNA samples were amplified by polymerase chain reaction (PCR) using primers specific for the regions of the atpB-rbcL spacer of the chloroplast genome and the nuclear ribosomal internal transcribed spacer (nrITS) of the nuclear genome.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify DNA using PCR with specific primers

steps.description: PCR products of the atpB-rbcL spacer were directly sequenced.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence PCR products of atpB-rbcL spacer

steps.description: The nrITS amplicons were cloned using the yT&A cloning kit and sequenced with M13F and M13R primers.
Sequencing reactions were performed using the ABI BigDye 3.1 Terminator Cycle Sequencing Kit and the fragments were sequenced from both directions with the ABI PRISM 3730XL DNA Sequencer.
steps.searchable_summary: perform bidirectional sequencing using ABI BigDye kit

steps.description: All sequence polymorphisms were visually rechecked from the chromatograms.
steps.searchable_summary: visually check sequence polymorphisms from chromatograms

methods.method_name: Diversification Rate Estimation by Bayesian Analysis of Macroevolutionary Mixtures (BAMM)
methods.description: This method estimates the net diversification rate of species using Bayesian analysis, considering incomplete sampling and using the BAMM program.

steps.description: Recalculate the net diversification rate with 20% sampling fractions by the BAMM approach.
steps.searchable_summary: recalculate diversification rate using BAMM with 20% sampling

steps.description: For estimating the net diversification rate, 5,000,000 Markov chain Monte Carlo simulations with 1/1000 thinning and 10% burn-in were set.
steps.searchable_summary: run MCMC simulations for diversification rate estimation

steps.description: The phylorate plot that shows the speciation rate along branches of the phylogeny was drawn with the Jenks natural breaks method.
steps.searchable_summary: create phylorate plot using Jenks natural breaks

steps.description: A histogram of rate heterogeneity was also drawn to illustrate proportions of lineages of rate clusters in the phylogenetic tree.
All of the diversification rate analyses were conducted with the assistance of the BAMM program and R package BAMMtools.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct diversification rate analysis using BAMM and BAMMtools

methods.method_name: Diversification Rate Estimation Considering Incomplete Sampling
methods.description: This method refines diversification rate estimates by considering incomplete sampling and analyzing temporal changes in diversification rates.

steps.description: The BAMM analysis that considered 20% sampling fractions revealed a temporal change rather than spatial heterogeneity in the diversification rate of Lithocarpus.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze temporal changes in diversification rate with BAMM

steps.description: The effective number of sampling sizes (ESS) for the loglikelihood and the rate-shift-event estimation are 2249.43 and 4217.825, verifying the credibility of the inference of simulation.
steps.searchable_summary: verify simulation credibility using ESS values

steps.description: From 4501 simulation samples, the shift posterior distribution of 0, 1, 2, and 3 times rate-shift events are 0.97, 0.032, 0.0011, and 0.00022, respectively.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze shift posterior distribution from simulation samples

steps.description: Estimate the speciation rates of tropical lineages, subtropical lineages, and the whole tree.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate speciation rates for different lineages

steps.description: The phylo-plot and densityplot of the net diversification rate revealed a congruent trend towards a slight increase of the net diversification rate among different clades.
steps.searchable_summary: create phylo-plot and densityplot for diversification rate
